svg.text: ECO-SIM: Swallow × Invertebrates - Trans-continental Migration Clock
Migratory stopover windows locked to wet-season insect bloom |

g.text: T. leucorrhoa breeds in S. Cone (Oct–Mar)
and migrates N/NW to Cerrado wintering areas.
over TWICE per year, each time
exploiting a different insect emergence event.
Termite Revoada (Oct–Nov): alates fill the air
